description: Terms from approved policy memos. PRs adding these terms in diff lines are flagged and blocked from auto-merge. Maintain this file alongside memos in orgs/revops-global/memo/.

terms.policy: Q3: Mac-side monitors capped at 2x/day max ceiling
terms.reason: A new StartInterval key in a plist creates a Mac-side polling automation. Q3 memo caps these at 2x/day max (StartInterval must be ≥43200 seconds = 12h). Verify the interval meets the cap or get a memo override from Greg.

terms.policy: Q3: Mac-side monitors capped at 2x/day max ceiling
terms.reason: FREQ=HOURLY in an iCal/recurrence rule exceeds the Q3 2x/day monitor cap. Use FREQ=DAILY or set an explicit INTERVAL to stay within the 2x/day ceiling.

terms.policy: Q3: Mac-side monitors capped at 2x/day max ceiling
terms.reason: Adding a new 'Mac monitor' label may introduce a polling automation that violates the Q3 2x/day cap. Confirm the new monitor is within budget or remove it.
